description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Interceptor

Initially designed as Aegis’ frontline carrier ship for the military, the Avenger Stalker took a different path, ultimately having a long and storied career as the standard patrol craft of the UEE Advocacy. Utilizing its cargo hold for prisoner transport, the Avenger features a sturdy, reliable hull and the capacity for larger-than-expected engine mounts.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Interceptor

Diseñada inicialmente como nave de primera línea para el transporte militar de Aegis, la Avenger Stalker tomó un camino diferente, desarrollando una larga y destacada carrera como nave de patrulla estándar de la Advocacy de la UEE. Utilizando su bodega de carga para el transporte de prisioneros, la Avenger cuenta con un casco robusto y fiable y la capacidad de montar motores más grandes de lo habitual.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Light Freight 

Lacking the Prisoner Cells of the Stalker or the EMP Generator of the Warlock, the Titan’s hold is free to carry cargo. Couple that available space with the Avenger’s tried and true combat abilities and you’ve got a light cargo hauler that’s more than capable of handling itself in a fight.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Carga ligera

Al carecer de las celdas de prisioneros de la Stalker o del generador EMP de la Warlock, la bodega de la Titan queda libre para transportar carga. Si a ese espacio disponible le sumas las probadas capacidades de combate de la Avenger, obtienes un carguero ligero más que capaz de defenderse en combate.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Light Freight

Created as part of the ‘Masters of Flight’ series in conjunction with the flight-sim Arena Commander, the Renegade pays tribute to famed pilot Danny Solomon for his notable work with the Advocacy to bring justice to Bremen. This Avenger Titan comes equipped with a specialized dogfighting focused loadout and a custom special edition livery honoring this iconic ship.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Carga ligera

Creada como parte de la serie “Masters of Flight” en colaboración con el simulador de vuelo Arena Commander, la Renegade rinde homenaje al famoso piloto Danny Solomon por su destacada labor junto a la Advocacy para llevar la justicia a Bremen. Esta Avenger Titan viene equipada con un armamento especializado orientado al combate aéreo y una pintura especial de edición conmemorativa de esta icónica nave.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Interdiction

The Avenger Warlock was built towards a single design philosophy: stop ships, don’t destroy them. Probably the closest to a non-lethal fighter, the Warlock is outfitted with a Behring REP-8 EMP Generator, capable of emitting a powerful electromagnetic wave to disable any electronics unfortunate enough to be within the blast radius.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Interdicción

La Avenger Warlock fue diseñada con una filosofía clara: detener naves, no destruirlas. Probablemente el caza más cercano a un concepto no letal, la Warlock está equipada con un generador EMP Behring REP-8, capaz de emitir una potente onda electromagnética que inutiliza cualquier sistema electrónico dentro de su radio de acción.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Stealth Bomber

The Aegis Eclipse is a bomber designed to get in and strike before it's ever even spotted. After extensive service with the UEE, this high-tech military equipment made its civilian market debut in 2947.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Bombardero sigiloso

La Aegis Eclipse es un bombardero diseñado para entrar, atacar y desaparecer antes siquiera de ser detectado. Tras un amplio servicio en la UEE, este avanzado equipo militar llegó al mercado civil en 2947.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Light Fighter

The Gladius is an older design which has been updated over the years to keep up with modern technology. In military circles, the Gladius is beloved for its performance and its simplicity. A fast, light fighter with a laser-focus on dogfighting, the Gladius is an ideal interceptor or escort ship.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Caza Ligero

El Gladius es un diseño antiguo que se ha actualizado a lo largo de los años para mantenerse al día con la tecnologia moderna. En los circulos militares, el Gladius es apreciado por su rendimiento y su simplicidad. El Gladius, un caza rápido y ligero con enfoque laser en las peleas aereas, es una nave interceptor o de escolta ideal.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Light Fighter 

Honor the famed Captain who shaped the course of the UEE Navy's elite fighter squadron with the Dunlevy variant for the Aegis Gladius. This special ship pays to tribute to Captain Alexandra Dunlevy and Squadron 42 with red highlights against a grey base paint and military-grade components.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Caza ligero

Rinde homenaje al famoso Capitán que moldeó el curso del escuadrón élite de cazas de la UEE con la variante Dunlevy para el Aegis Gladius. Esta nave especial rinde tributo a la Capitán Alexandra Dunlevy y al Escuadrón 42 con detalles rojos sobre una pintura base gris y componentes de grado militar.

description.en: Aegis Gladius Pirate
description.es: Aegis Gladius Pirata

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Light Fighter 

Created as part of the ‘Masters of Flight’ series in conjunction with the flight-sim Arena Commander, the Valiant pays tribute to famed defense pilot Condi Hillard for being the first Human on record to defeat a Vanduul in combat. This Gladius comes equipped with a specialized dogfighting focused loadout and a custom special edition livery honoring her iconic ship.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Caza Ligero 

Creado como parte de la serie 'Masters of Flight' en conjunto con el simulador de vuelo Arena Commander, el Valiant rinde homenaje al famoso piloto de defensa Condi Hillard por ser el primer humano registrado en derrotar a un vanduul en combate. Este Gladius viene equipado con un equipamiento especializado en peleas de perros y una decoracion de edicion especial personalizada en honor a su iconico nave.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics 
Focus: Heavy Gunship

A fast patrol ship with multiple turrets designed to combat fighters, the Hammerhead is equally suited to support larger capital ships in a fleet or act as a flagship for fighter groups.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics 
Enfoque: Heavy Gunship

Una nave patrullera rapida con multiples torretas diseñadas para combatir cazas, la Hammerhead es igualmente adecuada para apoyar naves capitales mas grandes en una flota o actuar como Nave insignia para grupos de cazas.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics 
Focus: Heavy Gunship

A fast patrol ship with multiple turrets designed to combat fighters, the Hammerhead is equally suited to support larger capital ships in a fleet or act as a flagship for fighter groups.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics 
Enfoque: Heavy Gunship

Una nave patrullera rapida con multiples torretas diseñadas para combatir cazas, la Hammerhead es igualmente adecuada para apoyar naves capitales mas grandes en una flota o actuar como Nave insignia para grupos de cazas.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Frigate

Larger than a bomber but smaller than a ship-of-the-line, frigates occupy an interesting space in the pantheon of Naval warships. While they lack the heavy armor and the capital weaponry of a cruiser, the UEE Navy prizes its frigates as they are maneuverable and can be adapted for use in a wide-range of combat scenarios.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Fragata

Más grande que un bombardero pero más pequeña que una nave de línea, las fragatas ocupan un espacio interesante en el panteón de los buques de guerra navales. Aunque carecen de la armadura pesada y el armamento capital de un crucero, la Armada de la UEE valora sus fragatas, ya que son maniobrables y pueden adaptarse para su uso en una amplia variedad de escenarios de combate.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Frigate

A mark two 'peacekeeper' variant developed for the UEE patrol services, the Idris-P strips the standard ship's ship-to-ship gun and spinal mount in favor of additional cargo capacity and superior speed.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Fragata

Una variante de "pacificador" de la marca dos desarrollada para los servicios de patrullaje de la UEE, la Idris-P elimina el arma estándar de nave a nave y el montaje espinal a favor de una mayor capacidad de carga y mayor velocidad.

name.es: Aegis Idris-P Wikelo Edición de Guerra

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Frigate

A mark two 'peacekeeper' variant developed for the UEE patrol services, the Idris-P strips the standard ship's ship-to-ship gun and spinal mount in favor of additional cargo capacity and superior speed.

Wikelo here. Made useful modifications to make ship fight more hard. Very impressive.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Fragata

Una variante mark dos “peacekeeper” desarrollada para los servicios de patrulla de la UEE, la Idris-P sustituye el cañón estándar de nave a nave y el montaje axial en favor de una mayor capacidad de carga y una velocidad superior.

Wikelo aquí. He hecho modificaciones útiles para que nave pelee más fuerte. Muy impresionante.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Destroyer

Designed for use by the UEE military, the Javelin is a massive, modular capital ship that can be appropriated for entrepreneurial use. With a detailed interior, plenty of modular room options, and a high crew capacity, the Javelin is a ship that has made a name for itself in a variety of roles.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Destroyer

Diseñado para uso militar de la UEE, el Javelin es una enorme nave capital modular que puede utilizarse para uso empresarial. Con un interior detallado, muchas opciones de habitaciones modulares y una gran capacidad de tripulacion, el Javelin es una nave que se ha hecho un nombre en una variedad de funciones.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Heavy Salvage

The Aegis Reclaimer is an industrial salvage ship. Equipped with a reinforced cargo bay, a long-range jump drive and launch pods for unmanned drones, the Reclaimer is an ideal ship for taking advantage of deep space wrecks. Tractor beams, floodlights, scanner options and docking ports round out the tools on this capable, utilitarian spacecraft.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Chaterrería pesada¡o

El Aegis Reclaimer es una nave de recuperación industrial. Equipado con una bahia de carga reforzada, un motor de salto de largo alcance y capsulas de lanzamiento para drones no tripulados, el Reclaimer es una nave ideal para aprovechar los restos de siniestros en el espacio profundo. Rayos tractores, reflectores, opciones de escaner y puertos de acoplamiento completan las herramientas de esta capaz y utilitaria nave espacial.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Gunship 

Designed by Aegis Dynamics, the Redeemer is a powerful fighting ship capable of holding its own in combat with a powerful weapons payload. Dotted with turrets and missiles, the Redeemer also doubles as an armored landing craft capable of delivering soldiers to the frontlines.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Gunship 

Diseñado por Aegis Dynamics, el Redeemer es un poderoso nave de combate capaz de defenderse en combate con una poderosa carga util de armas. Dotado de torretas y misiles, el Redeemer tambien funciona como una nave de desemnave blindada capaz de llevar soldados al frente.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Modular

This civilian refit of the Retaliator updates the military ship's chassis with unladen space able to be fitted with various modules to suit your needs.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Modular

Esta adaptación civil del Retaliator actualiza el chasis militar con espacio libre que puede equiparse con diversos módulos según tus necesidades.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Stealth Fighter

Part of Aegis Dynamics’ Phase Two of new ship models, the Sabre was designed as a space superiority fighter for those situations where you need to leave a lighter footprint. Designed to be a rapid responder, the Sabre is more than capable of establishing battlefield dominance for any number of combat scenarios.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Caza sigiloso

Parte de la segunda fase de nuevos modelos de naves de Aegis Dynamics, el Sabre fue diseñado como un caza de superioridad espacial para situaciones en las que necesitas una huella reducida. Concebido como respuesta rápida, el Sabre es más que capaz de establecer el dominio del campo de batalla en numerosos escenarios de combate.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Stealth Fighter

Created as part of the ‘Masters of Flight’ series in conjunction with the flight-sim Arena Commander, the Comet pays tribute to famed pilot Captain Kamur Dalion for his work with Aegis to usher in a new era of combat ship design. This Sabre comes equipped with a specialized dogfighting focused loadout and a custom special edition livery honoring this iconic ship.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Caza sigiloso

Creado como parte de la serie “Masters of Flight” en colaboración con el simulador Arena Commander, el Comet rinde homenaje al célebre piloto Capitán Kamur Dalion por su trabajo con Aegis en la nueva era del diseño de naves de combate. Este Sabre incluye un armamento optimizado para combate cercano y una pintura especial conmemorativa.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Stealth Fighter
 
When frontline skirmishes call for a swift and decisive offensive, the Sabre Firebird is the ideal medium fighter for any arsenal. Taking the already battle proven Sabre Raven, Aegis has designed the Firebird variant with an enhanced missile launcher capable of engaging with a wide array of threats.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Caza sigiloso
 
Cuando los enfrentamientos en primera línea requieren una ofensiva rápida y decisiva, el Sabre Firebird es el caza medio ideal para cualquier arsenal. Basado en el ya probado Sabre Raven, Aegis ha diseñado esta variante con un lanzador de misiles mejorado capaz de enfrentarse a una amplia variedad de amenazas.

name: Aegis Sabre Firebird Wikelo War Special

name.en: Aegis Sabre Firebird Wikelo War Special
name.es: Aegis Sabre Firebird Especial de la Guerra Wikelo

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Stealth Fighter
 
When frontline skirmishes call for a swift and decisive offensive, the Sabre Firebird is the ideal medium fighter for any arsenal. Taking the already battle proven Sabre Raven, Aegis has designed the Firebird variant with an enhanced missile launcher capable of engaging with a wide array of threats.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Caza sigiloso
 
Cuando los enfrentamientos en primera línea requieren una ofensiva rápida y decisiva, la Sabre Firebird es el caza medio ideal para cualquier arsenal. Partiendo de la ya probada Sabre Raven, Aegis ha diseñado la variante Firebird con un lanzador de misiles mejorado capaz de enfrentarse a una amplia variedad de amenazas.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Racing
 
After seeing what fans of the Sabre Raven were able to accomplish with the fighter on the racetrack, the design team at Aegis Dynamics were inspired to craft an official racing variant for the agile ship. Enter the Sabre Peregrine. Streamlined and featuring additional thruster boosts, this nimble bird is ready to fly across the finish line.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Carreras
 
Tras ver lo que los pilotos lograban con el Sabre Raven en circuitos, el equipo de diseño de Aegis creó una versión oficial de carreras: el Sabre Peregrine. Aerodinámico y con impulsores adicionales, está listo para cruzar la meta.

name: Aegis Sabre Peregrine Wikelo Speedy Special

name.en: Aegis Sabre Peregrine Wikelo Speedy Special
name.es: Aegis Sabre Peregrine Wikelo Speedy Special

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Racing
 
After seeing what fans of the Sabre Raven were able to accomplish with the fighter on the racetrack, the design team at Aegis Dynamics were inspired to craft an official racing variant for the agile ship. Enter the Sabre Peregrine. Streamlined and featuring additional thruster boosts, this nimble bird is ready to fly across the finish line.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Carreras
 
Tras ver lo que los pilotos lograban con el Sabre Raven en circuitos, el equipo de diseño de Aegis creó una versión oficial de carreras: el Sabre Peregrine. Aerodinámico y con impulsores adicionales, está listo para cruzar la meta.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics 
Focus: Interdiction

Aegis Dynamics have raised the bar yet again with their Raven variant, maintaining all the speed and maneuverability of its Sabre forebear, but with a lower ship signature, making it a fast, stealthy infiltrator.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics 
Enfoque: Interdicción

Aegis Dynamics eleva el nivel con la variante Raven, manteniendo la velocidad y maniobrabilidad del Sabre pero con menor firma, convirtiéndolo en un infiltrador rápido y sigiloso.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Heavy Gunship

An evolution of a proven Aegis design, the Tiburon's anti-capital ship configuration comprises a spine mounted forward facing beam weapon, supplemented by side mounted turrets.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Cañonera pesada

Una evolución de un probado diseño de Aegis, la configuración anticapital de la Tiburon incorpora un arma de energía montada en el eje central orientada hacia delante, complementada por torretas laterales.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Heavy Fighter / Bomber

The Vanguard Harbinger is Earth's standard fighter/bomber, converting the standard Warden's escape pod into a potent bomb bay. The extended range of the Vanguard and the relatively small profile mean that it can go where carrier-based ships or larger strategic bombers don't, strike hard, and then make it back to base.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Caza pesado / Bombardero

El Vanguard Harbinger es el caza-bombardero estándar de la Tierra. Sustituye la cápsula de escape por una bodega de bombas. Su alcance y tamaño compacto le permiten golpear con fuerza y regresar a base.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Drop Ship 

The Vanguard Hoplite is a cross between the winning Vanguard deep space fighter and a dedicated boarding ship. Adapted from proven assault ship designs, the Hoplite is the perfect tool for inserting an armored strike team with enough firepower to get them out again.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Nave de despliegue

El Vanguard Hoplite combina un caza de largo alcance con una nave de abordaje. Permite insertar un equipo armado con suficiente potencia para extraerlo posteriormente.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Heavy Fighter 

The Vanguard Sentinel is a ship that's designed to fight smart instead of taking enemies head on. The conversion features an AR cockpit, an external e-War pod, decoy missiles and a set of EMP charges. Vanguard Sentinels often provide necessary combat support for combined operations. A lone Sentinel is frequently paired with Harbinger bombers and Warden escorts for large attack missions.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Caza pesado

El Sentinel está diseñado para combatir con inteligencia. Incluye cabina AR, módulo de guerra electrónica, misiles señuelo y cargas EMP. Suele proporcionar apoyo en operaciones combinadas.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aegis Dynamics
Focus: Heavy Fighter

A hard-charging bulldog of a fighter which features extensive forward-mounted weaponry designed to tear through the shields and armor of other spacecraft. So-named because their multiple-jump range allows them to form the vanguard of any military expedition, Vanguards have seen extensive service against the Vanduul.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aegis Dynamics
Enfoque: Caza pesado

Un caza robusto con armamento frontal diseñado para destruir escudos y blindaje. Gracias a su gran autonomía, actúa como vanguardia en expediciones militares. Ha visto amplio servicio contra los Vanduul.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace 
Focus: Light Fighter

Unmatched design, blazing top speed, and ultra-responsive maneuverability make the Arrow the most agile scrapper in its class. With a robust weapons package that provides firepower to spare, this is truly the classic light fighter, updated for the next generation of combat.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace 
Enfoque: Caza ligero

Diseño ágil, gran velocidad y maniobrabilidad hacen del Arrow uno de los cazas ligeros más eficaces. Su armamento lo convierte en una opción versátil en combate.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Drop Ship
 
As the battles of today continue to grow in scale and complexity, Anvil Aerospace understands the impact a single vehicle can have on the outcome. Enter the Asgard. The next generation in ground vehicle transport, the Anvil Asgard features a quick-load ramp, a sizeable hold to securely store your assault vehicle of choice, and hefty array of armaments to ensure access to even the most combat-heavy of drop sites.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Nave de despliegue
 
La Asgard es la nueva generación de transporte de vehículos terrestres. Incluye rampa rápida, gran capacidad y armamento suficiente para acceder a zonas hostiles.

name.es: Anvil Asgard Wikelo Edición de Guerra

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Drop Ship
 
As the battles of today continue to grow in scale and complexity, Anvil Aerospace understands the impact a single vehicle can have on the outcome. Enter the Asgard. The next generation in ground vehicle transport, the Anvil Asgard features a quick-load ramp, a sizeable hold to securely store your assault vehicle of choice, and hefty array of armaments to ensure access to even the most combat-heavy of drop sites.

Wikelo here. Made useful modifications to make ship much more fighter like. Very impressive.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Nave de despliegue
 
La Asgard es la nueva generación de transporte de vehículos terrestres.

Wikelo aquí. Hice modificaciones útiles para hacer la nave más parecida a un caza. Muy impresionante.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Anti-Air

Keep your airspace clear of danger with the Anvil Ballista. Originally designed to defend outposts from Vanduul attacks, this mobile missile defense system packs a powerful loadout, allowing the Ballista to stand firm against any threat, whether it arrives by air or land.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Antiaéreo

Mantén tu espacio aéreo seguro con el Ballista. Diseñado para defensa contra Vanduul, este sistema móvil puede enfrentarse a amenazas terrestres y aéreas.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Anti-Air

Keep your airspace clear of danger with the Anvil Ballista. Originally designed to defend outposts from Vanduul attacks, this mobile missile defense system packs a powerful loadout, allowing the Ballista to stand firm against any threat, whether it arrives by air or land. The Dunestalker variant features a naturalistic paint scheme ideal for blending into harsh landscapes.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Antiaéreo

El Ballista Dunestalker incluye un esquema de camuflaje natural para integrarse en entornos hostiles.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Anti-Air

Keep your airspace clear of danger with the Anvil Ballista. Originally designed to defend outposts from Vanduul attacks, this mobile missile defense system packs a powerful loadout, allowing the Ballista to stand firm against any threat, whether it arrives by air or land. The Snowblind variant comes in a grey camouflage pattern to keep it concealed against rocky or lunar terrain.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Antiaéreo

El Ballista Snowblind presenta camuflaje gris para ocultarse en terreno rocoso o lunar.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Pathfinder

With its compact frame, deft maneuverability, and seating for three, the C8 Pisces snub craft, included with every Carrack, is built by Anvil Aerospace for scouting ahead or exploring environments inaccessible to its larger carrier ship.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Exploración

El C8 Pisces es una nave ligera diseñada para exploración y apoyo, incluida con la Carrack.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medical

With the addition of an onboard Tier 3 Medical Bed, the C8R Pisces can treat minor injuries and keep a patient stable while transporting them to the safety of a larger ship, station, or nearby medical facility, making it an invaluable asset for short-range search and rescue.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Médico

Con una cama médica de nivel 3, el C8R puede tratar heridas leves y estabilizar pacientes durante su transporte.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Pathfinder

Sporting more guns and a limited-edition livery, the C8X Pisces Expedition turns the stout snub into a perfectly viable standalone exploration vessel. With its compact frame, deft maneuverability, and seating for three, the Pisces Expedition is ready to take on its own adventures.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Exploración

El C8X Pisces Expedition convierte el snub en una nave de exploración independiente con armamento mejorado.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Expedition

Adventure calls and Anvil Aerospace answers with the Carrack. Built to endure extreme conditions in both space and atmosphere, this self-sustaining explorer has more than earned its long-standing status as the go-to pathfinder for both military and civilian service.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Expedición

La Carrack es una nave autosuficiente diseñada para exploración en condiciones extremas.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Expedition

Adventure calls and Anvil Aerospace answers with the Carrack. Built to endure extreme conditions in both space and atmosphere, this self-sustaining explorer has more than earned its long-standing status as the go-to pathfinder for both military and civilian service. The 'Expedition' edition features a special livery ideal for boldly traveling the stars.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Expedición

La edición Expedition incluye una pintura especial para exploradores.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Anti-Air

Built on Anvil's popular Atlas Platform, the Centurion presents a tactical solution for short-range anti-aircraft operations. Thanks to the Centurion’s custom energy-based AA turret, your forces can establish ground superiority by assuring immediate threats from above are dealt with quickly and efficiently.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Antiaéreo

El Centurion ofrece defensa antiaérea con una torreta energética diseñada para eliminar amenazas rápidamente.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter

The UEE Navy's premier carrier-based fighter craft, the F7A Hornet Mk I is the front-line attack ship for military combat missions. While not outfitted for long range runs, the Hornet can take her share of hits and dish out a powerful response.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Medio

La nave de combate principal de la Armada de la UEE, el F7A Hornet Mk I es la nave de ataque de primera línea para misiones militares. Aunque no está equipado para carreras de largo alcance, el Hornet puede resistir su parte de golpes y responder con potencia.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter
 
Ushering in a new age of space superiority, Anvil Aerospace has re-engineered the celebrated Hornet for the next generation of fighter combat.  Purpose built for the UEE Navy, the F7A Hornet Mk II maintains the spirit of the original while incorporating even more powerful offensive capabilities.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Mediano

Abriendo paso a una nueva era de superioridad espacial, Anvil Aerospace ha rediseñado el célebre Hornet para la próxima generación de combate de cazas. Construido específicamente para la Armada de la UEE, el F7A Hornet Mk II mantiene el espíritu del original mientras incorpora capacidades ofensivas aún más poderosas.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter

To the enemy, it is a weapon never to be underestimated. To allies, it's a savior. The F7C Hornet Mk I is the same dependable and resilient multi-purpose fighter that has become the face of the UEE Navy. The F7C is the foundation to build on and meet whatever requirements you have in mind.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Medio

Para el enemigo, es un arma que nunca debe subestimarse. Para los aliados, es un salvador. El F7C Hornet Mk I es el mismo caza polivalente fiable y resistente que se ha convertido en el emblema de la Armada de la UEE. El F7C es la base sobre la que construir y satisfacer cualquier requisito que tengas en mente.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter
 
Straight from the front lines to your personal hangar, the re-engineered F7C Hornet Mk II takes the latest battlefield upgrades and makes them available to private pilots across the empire. The fighter features an improved power system utilized by an overhauled weapon and missile package
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Mediano

Directo desde las líneas del frente hasta tu hangar personal, el reingenierizado F7C Hornet Mk II trae las últimas mejoras del campo de batalla y las pone a disposición de pilotos privados en todo el imperio. El caza cuenta con un sistema de energía mejorado utilizado por un paquete de armas y misiles renovado.

name: Anvil F7C Hornet Wildfire Mk I

name.en: Anvil F7C Hornet Wildfire Mk I
name.es: Anvil F7C Hornet Wildfire Mk I

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter

Created as part of the ‘Masters of Flight’ series in conjunction with the flight-sim Arena Commander, the Wildfire pays tribute to famed pilot Aria Reilly for her distinguished service with the legendary Squadron 42. This F7C Hornet Mk I comes equipped with her own personally selected loadout preferences and a custom special edition livery honoring her iconic ship.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Mediano

Creado como parte de la serie 'Masters of Flight' en conjunto con el simulador de vuelo Arena Commander, el Wildfire rinde homenaje a la famosa piloto Aria Reilly por su distinguido servicio con el legendario Escuadrón 42. Este F7C Hornet MK I viene equipado con sus preferencias de carga seleccionadas personalmente y una pintura especial de edición personalizada que honra su icónica nave.

name: Anvil F7C-M Hornet Heartseeker Mk I

name.en: Anvil F7C-M Hornet Heartseeker Mk I
name.es: Anvil F7C-M Hornet Heartseeker Mk I

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter

Designed for pilots whose true love is the pulse-pounding thrill of a harrowing dogfight, the limited-edition F7C-M Heartseeker Mk I is 'the one' for true combat die-hards. Loaded with top-of-the-line components and outfitted with four imposing Behring laser cannons, this fierce eradicator hones the legendary combat proficiency of the Super Hornet to give you the ultimate edge in space combat.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Medio

Diseñado para pilotos cuyo verdadero amor es la emocionante emoción de un combate aéreo lleno de peligros, el F7C-M Heartseeker Mk I de edición limitada es 'el indicado' para los auténticos fanáticos del combate. Cargado con componentes de última generación y equipado con cuatro imponentes cañones láser Behring, este feroz exterminador afina la legendaria destreza en combate del Super Hornet para darte la ventaja definitiva en el combate espacial.

name: Anvil F7C-M Hornet Heartseeker Mk II

name.en: Anvil F7C-M Hornet Heartseeker Mk II
name.es: Anvil F7C-M Hornet Heartseeker Mk II

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter
 
When the F7C-M Super Hornet got upgraded to the Mk II, there was no doubt in the Anvil Aerospace’s mind that they would be giving the very special Heartseeker edition the same treatment. With its robust weapon package designed for pilots whose true love is the thrill of a harrowing dogfight, the limited-edition F7C-M Heartseeker Mk II is set to become the favorite ship for an all-new generation of true combat die-hards.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Medio
 
Cuando el F7C-M Super Hornet fue actualizado al Mk II, no hubo duda en la mente de Anvil Aerospace de que le darían el mismo tratamiento a la edición especial Heartseeker. Con su robusto paquete de armas diseñado para pilotos cuyo verdadero amor es la emoción de un feroz combate aéreo, el F7C-M Heartseeker Mk II de edición limitada está destinado a convertirse en la nave favorita de una nueva generación de verdaderos fanáticos del combate extremo.

name: Anvil F7C-M Super Hornet Mk I

name.en: Anvil F7C-M Super Hornet Mk I
name.es: Anvil F7C-M Super Hornet Mk I

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter

The closest to the Military load-out as is legally possible for a Civilian model, the F7C-M Super Hornet Mk I reattaches the ball turret and offers near milspec parts under the hood. Proving that two heads are better than one, a second seat has been added to split the logistic and combat duty, making the Super Hornet a truly terrifying mark to engage.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Medio

Lo más cercano al equipamiento militar legalmente posible para un modelo civil, el F7C-M Super Hornet Mk I vuelve a colocar la torreta esférica y ofrece piezas casi militares bajo el capó. Demostrando que dos cabezas son mejores que una, se ha añadido un segundo asiento para dividir las tareas logísticas y de combate, convirtiendo al Super Hornet en un objetivo verdaderamente aterrador para enfrentarse.

name: Anvil F7C-M Super Hornet Mk II

name.en: Anvil F7C-M Super Hornet Mk II
name.es: Anvil F7C-M Super Hornet Mk II

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter
 
Refining their renowned military-class superiority fighter with the most up-to-date technology, Anvil Aerospace has crafted the F7C-M Super Hornet Mk II,  retaining the second seat and ball turret that made the original a truly terrifying mark to engage.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Medio
 
Perfeccionando su renombrado caza de superioridad militar con la tecnología más avanzada, Anvil Aerospace ha creado el F7C-M Super Hornet Mk II, manteniendo el segundo asiento y el rayo tractor que hicieron del original una marca verdaderamente aterradora para enfrentarse.

name: Anvil F7C-R Hornet Tracker Mk I

name.en: Anvil F7C-R Hornet Tracker Mk I
name.es: Anvil F7C-R Hornet Tracker Mk I

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Pathfinder

If the Ghost is made to hide, the Tracker is made to seek. The F7C-R Hornet Tracker Mk I boasts an advanced radar suite making it ideal for deep-space explorers who require depth and accuracy in their scan packages. Local militia and larger merc units will also repurpose Trackers to act as mobile C&C ships for their squadrons.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Explorador

Si el Ghost está hecho para esconderse, el Tracker está hecho para buscar. El F7C-R Hornet Tracker Mk I cuenta con una avanzada suite de radar que lo hace ideal para exploradores del espacio profundo que requieren profundidad y precisión en sus paquetes de escaneo. Milicias locales y unidades mercenarias más grandes también reutilizarán Trackers para actuar como naves de mando móviles para sus escuadrones.

name: Anvil F7C-R Hornet Tracker Mk II

name.en: Anvil F7C-R Hornet Tracker Mk II
name.es: Anvil F7C-R Hornet Tracker Mk II

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Pathfinder
 
When seeking the next great frontier, who better to trust than a next-generation pathfinder? The F7C-R Hornet Tracker Mk II boasts an overhauled radar suite ideal for deep-space explorers who require depth and accuracy in their scan packages.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Pathfinder

Cuando busques la próxima gran frontera, ¿quién mejor para confiar que un explorador de próxima generación? El F7C-R Hornet Tracker Mk II cuenta con un sistema de radar renovado, ideal para exploradores del espacio profundo que requieren profundidad y precisión en sus paquetes de escaneo.

name: Anvil F7C-S Hornet Ghost Mk I

name.en: Anvil F7C-S Hornet Ghost Mk I
name.es: Anvil F7C-S Hornet Ghost Mk I

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Stealth Fighter

Through a combination of low-emission drives, low-draw weapons, and Void Armor technology capable of diffusing scans, the F7C-S Hornet Ghost Mk I is built for the pilot who wants to keep a low profile. The Ghost is capable of slipping past the most ardent of observers to accomplish whatever goal you need to accomplish. Don't worry, we won't ask.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Sigiloso

A través de una combinación de propulsores de baja emisión, armas de bajo consumo y tecnología de blindaje del Vacío capaz de disipar los escaneos, el F7C-S Hornet Ghost Mk I está diseñado para el piloto que quiere mantener un perfil bajo. El Ghost es capaz de deslizarse ante los observadores más ardientes para lograr cualquier objetivo que necesites cumplir. No te preocupes, no preguntaremos.

name: Anvil F7C-S Hornet Ghost Mk II

name.en: Anvil F7C-S Hornet Ghost Mk II
name.es: Anvil F7C-S Hornet Ghost Mk II

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Stealth Fighter
 
When approaching the Mk II redesign of the F7C-S Hornet Ghost, the engineers at Anvil Aerospace wanted to preserve what pilots loved about the low-emission drives, low-draw weapons, and Void Armor technology of the original, but refine them to an even higher level of performance for a whole new era of stealth operations.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza Stealth

Al acercarse al rediseño Mk II del F7C-S Hornet Ghost, los ingenieros de Anvil Aerospace quisieron preservar lo que los pilotos amaban de los motores de baja emisión, las armas de bajo consumo y la tecnología Void Armor del modelo original, pero refinarlas a un nivel de rendimiento aún más alto para una nueva era de operaciones stealth.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medium Fighter
 
Refining their renowned military-class superiority fighter with the most up-to-date technology, Anvil Aerospace has crafted the F7C-M Super Hornet Mk II, retaining the second seat and ball turret that made the original a truly terrifying mark to engage.

Hello, I Wikelo. Made change to ship. Already impressive, yes, but made more so.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza mediano

Refinando su reconocido caza de clase militar con la tecnología más actual, Anvil Aerospace ha creado el F7C-M Super Hornet Mk II, manteniendo el segundo asiento y la torreta esférica que hicieron del original un objetivo realmente aterrador de enfrentar.

Hola, yo soy Wikelo. Hice cambio en nave. Ya impresionante, sí, pero ahora más.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Heavy Fighter

Few vehicles employed by the proud men and women who serve in our Empire’s Navy inspire the awe of the legendary F8 Lightning. A force to be reckoned with, the F8 has secured Humanity’s freedom from numerous threats at home and abroad countless times.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Heavy Fighter

Pocos vehículos empleados por los orgullosos hombres y mujeres que sirven en la Armada de nuestro Imperio inspiran el asombro del legendario F8 Lightning. Una fuerza a tener en cuenta, el F8 ha asegurado en innumerables ocasiones la libertad de la humanidad de numerosas amenazas dentro y fuera del pais.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace 
Focus: Heavy Fighter

Few vehicles employed by the proud men and women who serve in our Empire's Navy inspire the awe of the legendary F8 Lightning. A force to be reckoned with, the F8 has secured Humanity's freedom from numerous threats at home and abroad countless times. Now, that same next generation space superiority fighter is available to become a part of your personal fleet with the Anvil F8C civilian variant.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace 
Enfoque: Heavy Fighter

Pocos vehículos empleados por los orgullosos hombres y mujeres que sirven en la Armada de nuestro Imperio inspiran el asombro del legendario F8 Lightning. Una fuerza a tener en cuenta, el F8 ha asegurado en innumerables ocasiones la libertad de la humanidad de numerosas amenazas dentro y fuera del pais. Ahora, ese mismo caza de superioridad espacial de proxima generacion esta disponible para formar parte de su flota personal con la variante civil Anvil F8C.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace 
Focus: Heavy Fighter

Always ready to improve upon near-perfection, Anvil has coordinated with the Chairman's Club to create this stunning work of flying art, the F8C Lighting Executive Edition. The hull has been beautifully accentuated with a unique premium livery, while in the cockpit you'll find sumptuous gold and metallic detailing, a fitting crown for this king of heavy fighters.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace 
Enfoque: Heavy Fighter

Siempre listo para mejorar hasta alcanzar casi la perfeccion, Anvil se ha coordinado con el Chairman's Club para crear esta impresionante obra de arte volador, el F8C Lighting Executive Edition. El casco ha sido bellamente acentuado con una decoracion premium unica, mientras que en la cabina encontraras suntuosos detalles dorados y metalicos, una corona adecuada para este rey de los cazas pesados.

name: Anvil F8C Lightning Wikelo Sneak Special

name.en: Anvil F8C Lightning Wikelo Sneak Special
name.es: Anvil F8C Lightning Wikelo Edición Sigilosa

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace 
Focus: Heavy Fighter

Few vehicles employed by the proud men and women who serve in our Empire's Navy inspire the awe of the legendary F8 Lightning. A force to be reckoned with, the F8 has secured Humanity's freedom from numerous threats at home and abroad countless times. Now, that same next generation space superiority fighter is available to become a part of your personal fleet with the Anvil F8C civilian variant.

Wikelo here. Made useful modifications to make ship much tougher to see. Sneaky.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Caza pesado

Pocos vehículos empleados por los orgullosos hombres y mujeres que sirven en la Armada de nuestro Imperio inspiran la admiración del legendario F8 Lightning. Una fuerza a tener en cuenta, el F8 ha asegurado la libertad de la Humanidad frente a numerosas amenazas tanto en casa como en el extranjero en innumerables ocasiones. Ahora, ese mismo caza de superioridad espacial de próxima generación está disponible para formar parte de tu flota personal con la variante civil Anvil F8C.

Wikelo aquí. Hice modificaciones útiles para hacer que la nave sea mucho más difícil de ver. Sigilosa.

name: Anvil F8C Lightning Wikelo War Special

name.en: Anvil F8C Lightning Wikelo War Special
name.es: Anvil F8C Lightning Wikelo Edición de Guerra

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace 
Focus: Heavy Fighter

Few vehicles employed by the proud men and women who serve in our Empire's Navy inspire the awe of the legendary F8 Lightning. A force to be reckoned with, the F8 has secured Humanity's freedom from numerous threats at home and abroad countless times. Now, that same next generation space superiority fighter is available to become a part of your personal fleet with the Anvil F8C civilian variant.

Wikelo here. Made useful modifications to make ship much more fighter like. Very impressive.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace 
Enfoque: Caza Pesado

Pocos vehículos empleados por los orgullosos hombres y mujeres que sirven en la Armada de nuestro Imperio inspiran tanta admiración como el legendario F8 Lightning. Una fuerza con la que hay que contar, el F8 ha asegurado la libertad de la Humanidad frente a innumerables amenazas tanto en casa como en el extranjero. Ahora, ese mismo caza de superioridad espacial de próxima generación está disponible para formar parte de tu flota personal con la variante civil Anvil F8C.

Wikelo aquí. Hice modificaciones útiles para que la nave sea aún más un caza. Muy impresionante.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Bomber

The civilian model of the Gladiator appeals to those that want to explore the ‘verse with a bit of added security. Supporting a maximum of two, the Gladiator is perfectly equipped to explore and fight with or without a wingman. The Civilian model allows pilots to choose between an extra cargo hold or a bomb bay.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Bombardero

El modelo civil del Gladiator atrae a aquellos que desean explorar el verso con un poco de seguridad adicional. Con capacidad para un máximo de dos personas, el Gladiator está perfectamente equipado para explorar y luchar con o sin un compañero ala. El modelo civil permite a los pilotos elegir entre un espacio de carga adicional o una bahía de bombas.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace 
Focus: Light Fighter

A small, light fighter with an emphasis on weaponry, the Hawk boasts an impressive arsenal of lethal and non-lethal weapons, making it a perfect ship for independent bounty hunters or local security looking for a little more punch.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace 
Enfoque: Caza Ligero

Un caza pequeño y ligero con enfasis en armamento, el Hawk cuenta con un impresionante arsenal de armas letales y no letales, lo que lo convierte en una nave perfecto para cazarrecompensas independientes o seguridad local que buscan un poco mas de potencia. .

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Heavy Fighter

Big things do come in small packages: the Hurricane is a fighting spacecraft that packs a deadly punch into a slight fuselage. The spacecraft compensates for its lack of creature comforts with its powerful armament: six guns capable of blasting their way through nearly anything. Hurricane pilots have yet to find an enemy shield they can't knock down.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Heavy Fighter

Las cosas grandes vienen en paquetes pequeños: el Hurricane es una nave espacial de combate que da un golpe mortal en un fuselaje ligero. La nave espacial compensa su falta de comodidades con su poderoso armamento: seis cañones capaces de atravesar casi cualquier cosa. Los pilotos de huracanes aun tienen que encontrar un escudo enemigo que no puedan derribar.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Gunship
 
Designed by Anvil Aerospace, the Paladin is an intimidating frontline fight that makes a bold impact whenever it arrives in battle. Whether it’s executing a dangerous operation or leading the charge against overwhelming odds, with its powerful array of turreted weapons and ordnance the Paladin is ready to ride to the rescue.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Cañonera

Diseñado por Anvil Aerospace, el Paladin es un intimidante combatiente de primera línea que causa un gran impacto cada vez que llega a la batalla. Ya sea ejecutando una operación peligrosa o liderando el asalto contra probabilidades abrumadoras, con su potente gama de armas en torretas y munición, el Paladin está listo para acudir al rescate.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Passenger

Built on Anvil’s robust Atlas Platform, the same chassis used for their devastating Ballista air defense system, the Spartan is a fully armored transport outfitted with eight jump seats. The Spartan’s rugged frame makes it perfect for all kinds of terrain, and its remote Gatling turret helps clear the area for easier deployment.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Transporte de pasajeros

Construido sobre la robusta plataforma Atlas de Anvil, el mismo chasis utilizado en el sistema antiaéreo Ballista, el Spartan es un transporte completamente blindado equipado con ocho asientos de salto. Su estructura resistente lo hace ideal para todo tipo de terrenos, y su torreta Gatling remota ayuda a despejar la zona para un despliegue más seguro.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Pathfinder

Presenting the Anvil Aerospace U4A-3 Terrapin-class Scanning/Exploration Ship. The Terrapin was developed near the end of the 28th century to serve as the first ship in the Empire’s defensive restructuring of the Navy. The Terrapin’s watchword is protection, with extensive shield systems and armor layers designed to provide the maximum possible defense for pilot and crew. While it lacks the maneuverability of a dedicated fighter, it does maintain an advanced, hard-hitting array of weapons intended to keep the most fearsome Vanduul raider at bay.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Exploración

Presentamos la nave de exploración y escaneo clase Terrapin U4A-3 de Anvil Aerospace. Desarrollada a finales del siglo XXVIII como parte de la reestructuración defensiva de la Armada, la Terrapin prioriza la protección, con sistemas de escudo y blindaje diseñados para ofrecer la máxima defensa posible. Aunque no es tan maniobrable como un caza, dispone de un arsenal potente capaz de mantener a raya incluso a los asaltantes Vanduul.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medical

Maintaining the famed toughness of the original Terrapin, Anvil designers have crafted an optimal vehicle for rescue operations with the Terrapin Medic. Featuring a tier 2 medical bed, the Terrapin Medic can extract injured parties from even the most hazardous situations thanks to its powerful armor and shielding.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Médico

Manteniendo la legendaria resistencia del modelo original, el Terrapin Medic está optimizado para operaciones de rescate. Equipado con una cama médica de nivel 2, puede evacuar heridos incluso en situaciones extremadamente peligrosas gracias a su blindaje y escudos.

name: Anvil Terrapin Medic Wikelo Savior Special

name.en: Anvil Terrapin Medic Wikelo Savior Special
name.es: Anvil Terrapin Medic Wikelo Savior Special

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace
Focus: Medical

Maintaining the famed toughness of the original Terrapin, Anvil designers have crafted an optimal vehicle for rescue operations with the Terrapin Medic. Featuring a tier 2 medical bed, the Terrapin Medic can extract injured parties from even the most hazardous situations thanks to its powerful armor and shielding.

Wikelo here. Made useful modifications to make the ship even better so you can do more healing.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Médico

Manteniendo la legendaria resistencia del modelo original, el Terrapin Medic está optimizado para operaciones de rescate.

Wikelo aquí. Hice mejoras útiles para que la nave cure aún mejor.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Anvil Aerospace 
Focus: Drop Ship

The Valkyrie ups the ante on troop transport. Designed to carry up to twenty soldiers, as well as vehicles, to the most hostile locations, this conflict-ready mil-spec craft is a formidable force, both offensively and defensively. Built with military and private defense contractors in mind, the Valkyrie is one of the most efficient and effective personnel transports in its class.
description.es:
Fabricante: Anvil Aerospace
Enfoque: Nave de despliegue

La Valkyrie eleva el estándar del transporte de tropas. Diseñada para transportar hasta veinte soldados, así como vehículos, a las ubicaciones más hostiles, esta nave de especificación militar preparada para el combate es una fuerza formidable tanto en ataque como en defensa. Construida pensando en fuerzas militares y contratistas de defensa privados, la Valkyrie es uno de los transportes de personal más eficientes y efectivos de su clase.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aopoa
Focus: Light Fighter

The Xi'an Aopoa corporation manufactures an export model of the Qhire Khartu, the Khartu-al, for sale to human civilians as a dedicated scout/explorer. The export model features the same Xi'an maneuvering rig, but control surfaces modified for Human use and a more limited armament.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aopoa
Enfoque: Caza Ligero

La corporacion Xi'an Aopoa fabrica un modelo de exportacion del Qhire Khartu, el Khartu-al, para venderlo a civiles humanos como un explorador/explorador dedicado. El modelo de exportacion presenta el mismo equipo de maniobra Xi'an, pero superficies de control modificadas para uso humano y un armamento mas limitado.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aopoa
Focus: Racing

Hit the skids with the 2947 Nox. This speedy and maneuverable open-canopy racer from Aopoa is capable of zipping along planet surfaces or deep space. Available for the first time in Human space, the Nox has been specifically redesigned for Human pilots and is ready to race.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aopoa
Enfoque: Racing

Patina con el 2947 Nox. Este veloz y maniobrable vehículo de carreras con dosel abierto de Aopoa es capaz de deslizarse a lo largo de las superficies de los planetas o el espacio profundo. Disponible por primera vez en el espacio humano, el Nox ha sido rediseñado especificamente para pilotos humanos y esta listo para competir.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aopoa 
Focus: Racing

Deriving its name from the Xi’an word for ‘thrust,’ the Nox Kue delivers that and more. This limited version of the open-canopy racer features a stunning brushed-silver finish and was specifically created to celebrate the inaugural sale of the first Nox for Human riders.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aopoa
Enfoque: Carreras

Obteniendo su nombre de la palabra Xi'an que significa 'empuje', la Nox Kue ofrece eso y más. Esta versión limitada del vehículo de carreras de cabina abierta cuenta con un impresionante acabado plateado cepillado y fue creada específicamente para celebrar la venta inaugural de la primera Nox para pilotos humanos.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aopoa
Focus: Racing

Hit the skids with the 2947 Nox. This speedy and maneuverable open-canopy racer from Aopoa is capable of zipping along planet surfaces or deep space. Available for the first time in Human space, the Nox has been specifically redesigned for Human pilots and is ready to race.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aopoa
Enfoque: Racing

Patina con el 2947 Nox. Este veloz y maniobrable vehículo de carreras con dosel abierto de Aopoa es capaz de deslizarse a lo largo de las superficies de los planetas o el espacio profundo. Disponible por primera vez en el espacio humano, el Nox ha sido rediseñado especificamente para pilotos humanos y esta listo para competir.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Aopoa
Focus: Medium Fighter

Harnessing the power of next-generation Xi'an flight systems, upgraded dual-vector thrusters, and a daunting weapons package, Aopoa has crafted a fighter that retains the nimble dexterity and tight handling the brand is known for.
description.es:
Fabricante: Aopoa
Enfoque: Caza Mediano

Aprovechando el poder de los sistemas de vuelo Xi'an de próxima generación, propulsores de doble vector mejorados y un impresionante arsenal de armas, Aopoa ha creado un caza que conserva la destreza ágil y la maniobrabilidad precisa por la que la marca es conocida.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Light Freight

You got your plot of land, you’ve got the right construction materials, and now you’re ready to watch your dreams take shape. The ideal companion to the CSV-FM, the CSV Supply Model provides additional storage for all the resources required to build your next settlement.
description.es:
Fabricante: Argo Astronautics
Enfoque: Carga ligera

El CSV Supply Model ofrece almacenamiento adicional para la construcción de asentamientos.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Medium Mining

Argo’s iconic multi-operator laser extractor, more commonly referred to as the MOLE, lets you work faster and more effectively than ever before, thanks to its patented trilateral mining system. Three independently controlled articulated extraction stations allow for maximum power and near-limitless versatility. The MOLE lives by the adage "many hands make for light work".
description.es:
Fabricante: Argo Astronautics
Enfoque: Minería media

El MOLE permite minería eficiente con tres estaciones independientes.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Medium Mining

Argo’s iconic multi-operator laser extractor, more commonly referred to as the MOLE, lets you work faster and more effectively than ever before, thanks to its patented trilateral mining system. Three independently controlled articulated extraction stations allow for maximum power and near-limitless versatility. The MOLE lives by the adage "many hands make for light work".

This MOLE shows your support for the People's Alliance's cause in building a better future in Nyx with a unique livery and repurposed parts.

Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Medium Salvage

Experience Argo's centuries of industrial expertise with the MOTH. Using a tried and tested chassis as its foundation, the MOTH features three dedicated salvage turrets and an external salvage autoloader, so a four person crew can strip, rip, and store salvage as fast as they can get to it.
description.es:
Fabricante: Argo Astronautics
Enfoque: Salvamento medio

El MOTH permite a una tripulación de cuatro desmontar y almacenar chatarra rápidamente gracias a sus torretas y sistema automático.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Light Freight

The Argo Astronautics MPUV Cargo is a dedicated merchant transfer ship. A ubiquitous intergalactic stevedore, vast numbers of MPUV Cargos are responsible for loading and unloading goods onto ships that can't otherwise land on planets or drydocks, such as the Hull D and the Orion. Some hauler captains choose to own and operate their own Argo, while others prefer to contract with the local Argo owners found at many of the busier ports.
description.es:
Fabricante: Argo Astronautics
Enfoque: Carga ligera

El MPUV Cargo es una nave de transferencia utilizada para cargar y descargar mercancías de grandes naves.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Passenger

The Argo Astronautics MPUV-1P (commonly ‘Argo Personnel’). This version of the Argo is geared towards a simple but incredibly important responsibility: moving grounds of people from place to place. The UEE Navy uses MPUV-1Ps extensively, and any new recruit can likely recall those terrifying moments in which such a ship carried them to their first space assignment. In civilian hands, Argo Personnel ships are adapted for everything from standard taxi services to use as makeshift combat dropships. The Argo MPUV-1P is capable of carrying up to eight humans and their equipment.
description.es:
Fabricante: Argo Astronautics
Enfoque: Pasajeros

El MPUV-1P transporta hasta ocho personas y se utiliza tanto en ámbito militar como civil.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Light Freight

The Argo Astronautics MPUV-1T is outfitted with a tractor beam to allow it to handily move cargo containers on and off larger hauling vessels.  Its smaller size and maneuverability make it an ideal support vehicle at landing zones and space stations.
description.es:
Fabricante: Argo Astronautics
Enfoque: Carga ligera

Equipado con rayo tractor, permite mover contenedores fácilmente.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Medium Freight

The Argo RAFT features a hefty 192 SCU cargo hold, and is capable of carrying standardized 32 SCU cargo containers. Perfect for entry-level haulers and old pros alike, the RAFT is an ideal solution for reliable local freight transport.
description.es:
Fabricante: Argo Astronautics
Enfoque: Carga media

La RAFT permite transporte eficiente de contenedores estándar.

name.es: Argo RAFT Wikelo Edición de Trabajo

description.en:
Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Medium Freight

The Argo RAFT features a hefty 192 SCU cargo hold, and is capable of carrying standardized 32 SCU cargo containers. Perfect for entry-level haulers and old pros alike, the RAFT is an ideal solution for reliable local freight transport.

Wikelo hi. Made useful modifications to make ship even more industrious. You will like.
description.es:
Fabricante: Argo Astronautics
Enfoque: Carga media

Wikelo hi. Mejoras industriales aplicadas.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Recovery

When it comes to getting the job done, Argo doesn’t mess around. From simple freight and cargo towing to harrowing search-and-rescue operations, the SRV handles whatever you can throw at it. The bespoke tractor system utilizes an innovative plate and arm combination, allowing for effortless solo use as well as precision team towing for bigger jobs. Your crew and passengers stay safe too thanks to durable shields and heavy-duty armor that keep the cockpit and components secure when the situation gets hairy.
description.es:
Fabricante: Argo Astronautics
Enfoque: Recuperación

El SRV permite remolque y rescate con un sistema de rayo tractor avanzado.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Banu 
Focus: Light Fighter

Meet the Banu Defender, a multi-crew fighter whose patchwork design highlights technology from a variety of species. Featuring modest accommodations for its crew and easy access to components, the Defender gets its name from the role it serves: the first line of defense against enemy attacks. That's why the Defender makes the ideal companion to the Merchantman: one to do the heavy hauling and the other to perform the deadly dogfighting.
description.es:
Fabricante: Banu
Enfoque: Caza ligero

Caza multipuesto que actúa como defensa del Merchantman.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Consolidated Outland
Focus: Passenger

Designed as a companion ground vehicle for the Nomad, the HoverQuad's sleek angular frame utilizes four grav-lev pads for maximum maneuverability, making it the perfect transport across all kinds of surfaces.
description.es:
Fabricante: Consolidated Outland
Enfoque: Pasajeros

Vehículo terrestre ágil basado en tecnología gravlev.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Consolidated Outland 
Focus: Starter / Light Freight

Inspired by Consolidated Outland CEO Silas Koerner’s cutting edge vision, the Mustang Alpha is a sleek, stylish spacecraft that uses ultralight alloys to push power ratios to the limits, albeit sometimes unsafely. And now, with the optional Cargo Carrier, you can have the Alpha’s advantages without sacrificing carrying capacity.
description.es:
Fabricante: Consolidated Outland
Enfoque: Inicial / Carga ligera

Nave ligera versátil con opción de módulo de carga.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Consolidated Outland 
Focus: Pathfinder

The Mustang Beta, with its unprecedented range, is made for long duration flights. The factory standard Tarsus Leaper Jump Engine enables the Beta to travel to the galaxy’s farthest systems with ease, while the ship’s unique Com4T living quarters will make the journey feel like you never left home.
description.es: Fabricante: Consolidated Outland \nEnfoque: El Mustang Beta, con su alcance sin precedentes, está hecho para vuelos de larga duración. El motor de salto Tarsus Leaper estándar de fábrica permite al Beta viajar a los sistemas más lejanos de la galaxia con facilidad, mientras que los exclusivos habitáculos Com4T de la nave harán que el viaje parezca como si nunca hubieras salido de casa.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Consolidated Outland 
Focus: Light Fighter

While it may not be able to go toe to toe with some of the military specific ships, by reinforcing the Mustang’s already strong hull construction with Consolidated Outland’s own line of Cavalry Class Mass Reduction Armor, the Delta has a reduced cross-sectional signature that evens the playing field.
description.es:
Fabricante: Consolidated Outland 
Enfoque: Caza Ligero

Si bien es posible que no pueda competir cara a cara con algunos de las naves militares especificos, al reforzar la ya solida construccion del casco del Mustang con la propia linea de armadura de reduccion masiva de clase de caballeria de Consolidated Outland, el Delta tiene un firma transversal reducida que iguala el campo de juego.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Consolidated Outland 
Focus: Racing

Consolidated Outland’s design and engineering teams have managed to tweak and refine the Mustang into an admirable racer. The end result, the Mustang Gamma, has smooth acceleration, and power on demand thanks to an innovative package featuring three powerful Magma Jet engines for maximum thrust.
description.es:
Fabricante: Consolidated Outland 
Enfoque: Racing

Los equipos de diseño e ingenieria de Consolidated Outland han logrado modificar y perfeccionar el Mustang para convertirlo en un corredor admirable. El resultado final, el Mustang Gamma, tiene una aceleracion suave y potencia según demanda gracias a un paquete innovador que incluye tres potentes motores Magma Jet para un maximo empuje.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Consolidated Outland 
Focus: Racing

Consolidated Outland teamed up with custom tuning company Accelerated Mass Design to create a limited edition racer that features a ramped up fuel intake for faster recycling of the ship’s already impressive boost system. To cap off the collaboration, AMD enlisted resident underground artist Sektor8 to design the dynamic paint job.
description.es:
Fabricante: Consolidated Outland 
Enfoque: Racing

Consolidated Outland se asocio con la empresa de tuning personalizado Accelerated Mass Design para crear un corredor de edicion limitada que presenta un consumo de combustible aumentado para un reciclaje mas rápido del ya impresionante sistema de propulsión de la nave. Para culminar la colaboracion, AMD recluto al artista underground residente Sektor8 para diseñar el trabajo de pintura dinamico.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Consolidated Outland 
Focus: Starter / Light Freight

With the versatility of a medium-sized multi-purpose freighter packed into a stylish, compact frame, the Consolidated Outland Nomad is the model of self-sufficiency, the spirit of the open sky, and the perfect solution for anyone yearning to start a brand-new adventure.
description.es:
Fabricante: Consolidated Outland 
Enfoque: Inicial / Carga ligera

Con la versatilidad de un carguero multipropósito de tamaño medio integrada en una estructura compacta y elegante, la Consolidated Outland Nomad es el modelo de autosuficiencia, el espíritu del cielo abierto y la solución perfecta para cualquiera que desee comenzar una aventura completamente nueva.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Crusader Industries
Focus: Bomber

Crusader Industries brings its usual commitment to excellence directly to the civilian market with the A1 Spirit, a mid-size multi-purpose starship equipped as a light bomber but packing enough versatility to tackle multiple roles and unpredictable jobs.
description.es:
Fabricante: Crusader Industries
Enfoque: Bombardero

Crusader Industries lleva su habitual compromiso con la excelencia directamente al mercado civil con la A1 Spirit, una nave estelar multipropósito de tamaño medio equipada como bombardero ligero pero con suficiente versatilidad para asumir múltiples funciones y trabajos imprevisibles.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Crusader Industries
Focus: Heavy Bomber

The A2 Starlifter has been used to devastating effect in airborne assaults, search and rescue operations, and landing initiatives. With more than double the firepower of the M2, and a custom bomb bay capable of delivering a staggering payload, the A2 caters to anyone hauling massive amounts of cargo through potentially unfriendly skies.
description.es:
Fabricante: Crusader Industries
Enfoque: Bombardero pesado

La A2 Starlifter se ha utilizado con efectos devastadores en asaltos aéreos, operaciones de búsqueda y rescate e iniciativas de aterrizaje. Con más del doble de potencia de fuego que la M2 y una bodega de bombas personalizada capaz de desplegar una carga devastadora, la A2 está pensada para cualquiera que transporte grandes cantidades de carga por cielos potencialmente hostiles.

name: Crusader A2 Hercules Starlifter Wikelo War Special

name.en: Crusader A2 Hercules Starlifter Wikelo War Special
name.es: Crusader A2 Hercules Starlifter Wikelo War Special

description.en:
Manufacturer: Crusader Industries
Focus: Heavy Fighter

Whether heading up a crew or hunting big ships solo, the Ares Inferno is a force to be reckoned with. This ballistic Gatling-equipped variant tears through gunship armor and turns smaller fighters to dust in seconds.
description.es:
Fabricante: Crusader Industries
Enfoque: Caza pesado

Ya sea liderando una tripulación o cazando grandes naves en solitario, la Ares Inferno es una fuerza a tener en cuenta. Esta variante equipada con Gatling balística atraviesa el blindaje de cañoneras y convierte cazas pequeños en polvo en cuestión de segundos.

name: Crusader Ares Star Fighter Inferno Wikelo War Special

description.en:
Manufacturer: Crusader Industries
Focus: Heavy Fighter

Spark fear in the corridors of the most formidable gunships and frigates with the Ares Ion. This laser-equipped variant delivers extremely powerful shots to quickly disable the shields of even the biggest enemy vessels.
description.es:
Fabricante: Crusader Industries
Enfoque: Caza pesado

Infunde miedo en los pasillos de las cañoneras y fragatas más formidables con la Ares Ion. Esta variante equipada con láser dispara descargas extremadamente potentes para desactivar rápidamente los escudos incluso de las mayores naves enemigas.

name: Crusader Ares Star Fighter Ion Wikelo Sneak Special

name.en: Crusader Ares Star Fighter Ion Wikelo Sneak Special

Spark fear in the corridors of the most formidable gunships and frigates with the Ares Ion. This laser-equipped variant delivers extremely powerful shots to quickly disable the shields of even the biggest enemy vessels.

Wikelo here. Made useful modifications to make ship much tougher to see. Sneaky.

Wikelo aquí. Hice modificaciones útiles para que la nave sea mucho más difícil de ver. Sigilosa.

Manufacturer: Crusader Industries
Focus: Light Freight

Crusader Industries brings its usual commitment to excellence directly to the civilian market with the C1 Spirit, a mid-size multi-purpose starship built for cargo transport and delivery but packing enough versatility to tackle multiple roles and unpredictable jobs.
description.es:
Fabricante: Crusader Industries
Enfoque: Carga ligera

Crusader Industries lleva su habitual compromiso con la excelencia directamente al mercado civil con la C1 Spirit, una nave estelar multipropósito de tamaño medio construida para el transporte y entrega de carga, pero con suficiente versatilidad para asumir múltiples funciones y trabajos imprevisibles.

Crusader Industries lleva su habitual compromiso con la excelencia directamente al mercado civil con la C1 Spirit, una nave estelar multipropósito de tamaño medio construida para el transporte y entrega de carga, pero con suficiente versatilidad para asumir múltiples funciones y trabajos imprevisibles.

Wikelo aquí. Hice modificaciones útiles para hacerla mucho más impresionante.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Crusader Industries
Focus: Heavy Freight

Utilizing the patented Hercules military-grade spaceframe and expanding cargo capacity, while sacrificing barely any firepower, the C2 has taken the private sector by storm. It has become the industry standard for racing teams, ship dealers and manufacturers, construction orgs, mining corporations, and even large-scale touring entertainment outfits.
description.es:
Fabricante: Crusader Industries
Enfoque: Carga pesada

Utilizando la estructura espacial militar patentada Hercules y ampliando la capacidad de carga, apenas sacrificando potencia de fuego, la C2 ha arrasado en el sector privado. Se ha convertido en el estándar de la industria para equipos de carreras, vendedores y fabricantes de naves, organizaciones de construcción, corporaciones mineras e incluso grandes compañías de entretenimiento itinerante.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Crusader Industries
Focus: Starter / Light Freight

For those eager to meet their future head on, the renowned ship engineers at Crusader Industries proudly present the Intrepid. A bold ship ready to tackle any number of jobs and conquer numerous challenges, the Intrepid features efficient cargo space and comfortable living quarters to make the most of your solo journey across the stars.
description.es:
Fabricante: Crusader Industries
Enfoque: Inicial / Carga ligera

Para quienes desean afrontar su futuro de frente, los reconocidos ingenieros navales de Crusader Industries presentan con orgullo la Intrepid. Una nave audaz, lista para abordar numerosos trabajos y superar múltiples desafíos, la Intrepid cuenta con un espacio de carga eficiente y cómodas dependencias habitables para sacar el máximo partido a tu viaje en solitario por las estrellas.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Crusader Industries
Focus: Starter / Light Freight

For those eager to meet their future head on, the renowned ship engineers at Crusader Industries proudly present the Intrepid. A bold ship ready to tackle any number of jobs and conquer numerous challenges, the Intrepid features efficient cargo space and comfortable living quarters to make the most of your solo journey across the stars.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Crusader Industries
Focus: Heavy Freight

The M2 Hercules is the UEE's premier tactical starlifter. The large-scale transport's potent combination of capacity, maneuverability, durability, and robust weapons package assures your cargo and crew get to where they’re going in one piece.
description.es:
Fabricante: Crusader Industries
Enfoque: Carga pesada

La M2 Hercules es el principal transporte estelar táctico de la UEE. La potente combinación de capacidad, maniobrabilidad, durabilidad y un robusto conjunto de armas de este transporte a gran escala garantiza que tu carga y tripulación lleguen a su destino de una pieza.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Crusader Industries
Focus: Medium Freight

If you need it there fast and unscathed, the Mercury checks all the boxes expected of a dependable courier vessel and then some. Built with the same engineering and design principles that have made Crusader Industries the go-to manufacturer for galactic transport on any scale, the Mercury Star Runner will let you stay ahead of schedule, trouble, and the competition.
description.es:
Fabricante: Crusader Industries
Enfoque: Carga media

Si necesitas que llegue rápido e intacto, la Mercury cumple todos los requisitos que se esperan de una nave de mensajería fiable, y algo más. Construida con los mismos principios de ingeniería y diseño que han convertido a Crusader Industries en el fabricante de referencia para el transporte galáctico a cualquier escala, la Mercury Star Runner te permitirá ir por delante del horario, de los problemas y de la competencia.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary
Focus: Light Fighter

The Buccaneer has been designed from the ground up to fly and fight the way you live. No leather interiors or hyperpillows here: the Bucc is a scrapper designed to maneuver and fight above its weight class. This rough-and-tumble frontier fighter can be maintained in the worst of conditions in order to keep real, working space crews alive.
description.es:
Fabricante: Drake Interplanetary
Enfoque: Caza ligero

La Buccaneer ha sido diseñada desde cero para volar y combatir como tú vives. Nada de interiores de cuero ni hipercojines: la Bucc es una luchadora diseñada para maniobrar y pelear por encima de su categoría. Este caza fronterizo, duro y directo, puede mantenerse en las peores condiciones para mantener con vida a auténticas tripulaciones espaciales trabajadoras.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary
Focus: Medium Freight

First introduced in 2871, Drake Interplanetary's Caterpillar has long proven to be a reliable, cost-effective multi-role vessel, capable of being outfitted for everything from mercantile operations to combat support. Long hailed as a hard-fought alternative to the ubiquitous Hull series, the Caterpillar is a freighter that doesn't skimp on weaponry or customization.
description.es:
Fabricante: Drake Interplanetary
Enfoque: Carga media

Presentada por primera vez en 2871, la Caterpillar de Drake Interplanetary ha demostrado durante mucho tiempo ser una nave polivalente fiable y rentable, capaz de equiparse para todo tipo de operaciones, desde actividades mercantiles hasta apoyo de combate. Considerada durante mucho tiempo una alternativa duramente ganada a la omnipresente serie Hull, la Caterpillar es un carguero que no escatima en armamento ni personalización.

name: Drake Caterpillar 2949 Best In Show Edition

name.en: Drake Caterpillar 2949 Best In Show Edition
name.es: Drake Caterpillar 2949 Best In Show Edition

description.en:
Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary
Focus: Generalist
 
If there’s one thing every captain needs to take to heart as they prepare to journey across the stars it’s “expect the unexpected.” With a cargo bay, medical facilities, and crafting capabilities, along with Drake’s practical design sensibility, the Clipper is the perfect all-arounder for any new spacefaring enterprise.
description.es:
Fabricante: Drake Interplanetary
Enfoque: Generalista
 
Si hay algo que todo capitán debe tener presente al prepararse para viajar por las estrellas es “espera lo inesperado”. Con una bodega de carga, instalaciones médicas y capacidades de fabricación, junto con el enfoque práctico de diseño de Drake, la Clipper es la todoterreno perfecta para cualquier nueva empresa espacial.

description.en:
Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary
Focus: Generalist
 
If there’s one thing every captain needs to take to heart as they prepare to journey across the stars it’s “expect the unexpected.” With a cargo bay, medical facilities, and crafting capabilities, along with Drake’s practical design sensibility, the Clipper is the perfect all-arounder for any new spacefaring enterprise.
